Describe the sequence of visual events and text displays from the exterior shots through the beginning of the haircut.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a hanging sign reading 'Hair Fairy' appears on a building facade; at 6s, a man stands with arms spread wide while 'VICKY!' displays; at 8s, a title card reads 'GETTING A HAIRCUT WITH THE FOUR'; at 14s, a person sits in a salon cape while a blonde stylist stands behind; at 18s, the stylist begins cutting the seated person's hair near spray cans.
